name: Chinese Mixed Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat a wok and swirl the vegetable oil around inside.
2. Rub the bottom and sides of the wok with gingerroot and garlic, then discard them.
3. Add cabbage to the wok and stir.
4. Stir in salt, sugar, MSG (if using), and chicken broth.
5. Cover and cook for 3 minutes.
6. Add pea pods, bamboo shoots, and mushrooms, stirring briefly.
7. Serve.
